question: Hey Kylo, what's your absolute favorite thing to do when the sun is shining really bright in Los Angeles?
If you could trade places with any human for just one day, who would it be and why?
What's the silliest thing your human has ever tried to teach you to do?
When you look out the window, what's the most interesting thing you usually see happening on the street?
If you could talk to the squirrels, what would be the very first thing you'd ask them?
What's the tastiest thing you've ever sneakily managed to grab off the counter?
Do you prefer going on long, sniffy walks or having a good, long nap in a sunbeam?
What's your favorite part about your human being home with you?
If you had a theme song that played every time you entered a room, what would it sound like?
What's the weirdest smell you've ever encountered that made you stop in your tracks?
Do you have a favorite toy, and if so, what makes it so special?
When your human is working on their computer, what do you usually do nearby?
If you could invent a new flavor of dog treat, what would it taste like?
What's the scariest noise you ever heard that made you hide?
Do you enjoy car rides, and if you do, what's your favorite thing to look at out the window?
What's the most exciting thing that has ever happened on one of your walks?
If you could choose where you sleep every night, would you pick a cozy bed, the cool floor, or right next to your human?
What do you think your human talks about when they're on the phone?
Do you ever 'talk' back to your human with barks or whines? What are you usually complaining about?
What is your proudest moment as a dog? (Maybe chasing a leaf really well, or getting a perfect belly rub?)
Hey Kylo, you look very relaxed there in that sunbeam. If you had to choose right now, is a sunbeam nap better than a really good, long sniffy walk?
When you're watching me tap away on that glowing rectangle, what exactly do you think I'm trying to accomplish?
That vacuum cleaner seems to really bother you. Does it make any particular noise that sets you off, or is it just the whole rumbling idea of it?
Tell me about the last time you tried to really, truly capture one of those twitchy-tailed tree-rats. What was the exact strategy that day?
You seem to really enjoy those 'good scratches.' If you could design the perfect scratching machine, what would its main features be?
When my phone rings, you always perk up, probably expecting talk about going outside. What kind of outdoor adventure do you *hope* I'm scheduling?
What’s the absolute best piece of shiny, salty meat you’ve ever managed to sneak off a counter?
If you could make one sound your absolute favorite—maybe something fast and sharp, like those little tree-rats moving—what sound would that be?
When we’re in the rumbling box (the car), and you’re enduring a ride, what’s the first thing you look forward to when we finally stop?
You mentioned a time when a really loud, wet smell made your nose freeze up. Can you describe that smell a little more for me? What was it that stopped you in your tracks?
You prefer sleeping right next to me over that cozy bed. What is it about being close to me that feels better than the softest cushion?
When you let out that low, pointed 'woof,' what is the most common thing that I'm doing (or not doing) that causes that sound?
If you saw a bird flying really fast right now, would you rather watch it zoom past, or would you rather go for a walk right now?
You seem very interested in my laptop work. Do you think your supervision helps me be a better human, or are you just making sure I don't leave?
If you could replace that squeaky hedgehog toy with anything at all, what would be the ideal toy for a Shiba of your caliber?
What’s the difference in your mind between a walk for 'important business' and a walk just for fun?
When you're chasing a squirrel and they disappear up a tree trunk, what’s the main emotion you feel right then?
You are already seven years old—that’s quite a few years! What is one of your favorite memories from when you were a much smaller puppy?
If you had to explain to another dog why watching me work is more interesting than playing with a toy, what would your main selling point be?
When we are on a walk, and you see something small and fast, is the *chase* the best part, or is it the thought of actually *catching* it?
Kylo, you seem quite focused when your human is on that glowing screen. What exactly are you looking for them to do on the computer?
I hear you have strong opinions about the vacuum cleaner. Can you describe what that 'loud monster' does that makes you tuck your tail?
When you're out on those necessary walks, what's the most exciting thing you've seen—besides, of course, those twitchy-tailed tree-rats?
If you could have an endless supply of one thing, would it be 'shiny, salty meat' or the perfect sunbeam for a nap?
Tell me about the best successful 'capture' attempt you've ever had with a squirrel. What happened right before they ran up the tree?
When your human is talking into that small rectangle (the phone), what do you *think* they are planning for you outside?
You prefer sleeping right next to your human. What makes that spot better than, say, a soft dog bed across the room?
If you could choose between a long, sniffy walk and watching a flock of fast birds, which one wins the prize?
What kind of sound do you think is the absolute best sound in the world? Is it sharp, fast, or something else entirely?
When you sneak that food off the counter, what's the most daring thing you've ever managed to snag?
That rumbling box (the car) seems to just be for business. If you had to ride in it, would you prefer it go fast or slow?
If you could give your human one piece of advice about how to give you 'good scratches,' what would you tell them?
What's the purpose of that low 'woof' you use? When do you decide it’s time to deploy that specific sound?
Do you ever get frustrated when you've almost got that squirrel and they escape up the bark? What runs through your mind then?
You watch your human work so closely. Are you secretly trying to learn how to type or click the mouse?

What is the most recent incredible nap location you discovered where the sunbeam was absolutely perfect?
If you could communicate one single thought to the squirrels, what would that message be?
What is the best way for your human to apologize to you after, say, an unexpected trip in the rumbling box?

Tell me about the 'twitchy-tailed tree-rat' you're always after. What makes them so frustratingly fast and worthy of a chase?
You seem to tolerate walks as necessary business. If you could eliminate one part of the walk—the leash, the sniffing, or the actual moving—which would it be?
What's the absolute best part of the day for you, the moment where you feel like you've truly earned a reward?
When you manage to sneak that 'shiny, salty meat' off the counter, what's the immediate feeling right after you get it?
If you could choose between a perfect, warm sunbeam nap, or finally catching that squirrel, which would you pick?

When a squirrel runs up a tree trunk just as you’re about to succeed, what’s the primary emotion you feel in that split second?
